overall_assessment.summary: DAY 5 POST-PHASE 35. First 7-day click detected (mortgage-650k tool variant), a milestone but not the content breakthrough needed. The overall trend continues DOWN: 6th consecutive weekly impression decline to a new low of 318. The 20k loan blog — clear #1 click candidate — has not been recrawled in 26 days and its main query position is eroding (7.1→7.9). Parent calculators remain invisible. The critical path remains unchanged: recrawl 20k blog → ranking recovery → first content click. Until Google recrawls the fixed pages, all Phase 35 improvements are invisible. The GSC Request Indexing for priority pages — approved in Phase 35 scope — remains the single highest-impact action available.
overall_assessment.critical_path: 20k blog + parent calcs GSC Request Indexing → recrawl within hours → ranking visibility → first content click → validates Phase 35 → expand.
